stemHtml: Which of the following correctly describes the phenomenon of multipath in radio wave propagation?

options.a: Receiving the same signal from multiple directions at the same time due to reflections from surfaces.
options.b: A situation where multiple transmitters send the same signal to a receiver.
options.c: Interference caused by signals from different frequencies converging at the receiver.
options.d: A signal being blocked by obstacles, resulting in a loss of reception.
